series_metadata.series_title: RECLAMATION BOARD OF REVIEW CASE FILES
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains the documents associated with each RBR case file for all appeals, pleadings and other documents filed with RBR, any documents generated by the board with regard to pending appeal, where hearings have been conducted any documentary evidence entered into the Record and a Transcript of the proceedings. This file also contains Certified Mail Receipts of all mailing sent out in regards to case and Case File Registers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: To be retained in office area for five (5) years from completion of case then transfered to Archives., Paper: Archives
